name: shadow-divers
description: Robert Kurson's 'Shadow Divers: The True Adventure of Two Americans Who Risked Everything to Solve One of the Last Mysteries of World War II' — the true story of John Chatterton and Richie Kohler, two deep-sea wreck divers who discovered a German U-boat off the New Jersey coast and spent six years identifying it. A tale of extreme diving, historical detective work, obsession, and the rewriting of WWII history.
useCase: Understanding deep-wreck diving, WWII U-boat history, historical detective methods, the culture of extreme sport, and the personal journey of obsession and discovery.
knownRisks: Some diving technical details may be dense for non-divers
Contains graphic descriptions of diving deaths and injuries
The narrative is long and detail-rich
Some historical interpretations have been debated by other historians
